title: Pseudobarleria physaloides
taxonomy: Pseudobarleria physaloides is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It belongs to the genus Pseudobarleria, which is a group of flowering plants. The species Pseudobarleria physaloides is native to tropical regions and is often found growing in humid environments. Pseudobarleria physaloides is closely related to other plants in the same family and genus, such as species of the genus Barleria. Further classification may include more specific details about its botanical classification.
